hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'packages/(client|admin)/src/hooks/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: All hooks must be in packages/shared/src/hooks/' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'packages/[^/]+/\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Package-level .env files not allowed. Use root .env only.' >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|] *)bun test( |$)' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'bun run test'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use `bun run test` not `bun test` — bun test uses the built-in runner which ignores vitest config.' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE 'deploy.*mainnet|upgrade.*mainnet|vercel.*--prod'; then echo 'PRODUCTION DEPLOYMENT — Requires explicit user confirmation before proceeding'; fi
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git.*push.*--force.*(main|master)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never force push to main/master' >&2; exit 2; fi
printf '%s\n' 'Green Goods Claude Code' '  /plan /debug /review /audit /teams' '  Agents: oracle | cracked-coder | code-reviewer | migration | triage'

echo '## Post-Compaction Reminders
- Use `bun run test` (NEVER `bun test`) — bun test ignores vitest config
- Never use `forge build`/`forge test` directly — always use bun wrappers
- ALL hooks MUST live in packages/shared/src/hooks/ (not client or admin)
- Single .env at root only — never create package-specific .env files
- Import from `@green-goods/shared` barrel only — never deep paths
- Use `Address` type (not string) for Ethereum addresses
- Use `logger` from shared (not console.log)
- Use `parseContractError()` + `USER_FRIENDLY_ERRORS` for contract errors'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$' && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'packages/contracts/out/'; then npx @biomejs/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code needs your attention" with title "Green Goods"'
